title: Linarium RP
body:
# 🎨 Resource Pack for [Linarium Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/linarium)

> A lightweight visual enhancement to complement the Linarium experience.

---

## 📦 Features

- 🧩 **Puzzle Integration** — A custom loading screen built on Puzzle, seamlessly integrated with the **Vanilla-style title screen**.
- 🌅 **Custom Panorama** — A soft-shaded, immersive background panorama for a fresh but familiar feel.

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots

![Loading Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QvZ93Mdb/images/9f31ded4c66f0d3e8ae0097f386f6040bbf9b8c3.webp)

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QvZ93Mdb/images/1c15f4272a35068be3e379516e08495e78508704.webp)

---

## 🔖 Notes

- Fully compatible with the Linarium modpack.
- No gameplay-affecting changes — purely visual.
- All assets were created by me or properly licensed for use.

---

Crafted to match the aesthetic and vibe of Linarium — enjoy a polished and minimal look while staying true to vanilla roots.
